caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT ATWORK" sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. The background features a wall covered in framed photographs, a white mannequin wearing a white shirt, and racks of clothing. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him. In the initial sequence, he is speaking with a slight smile. As the scene progresses, he looks down and brings a red cup to his mouth to take a drink. Two logos are visible on screen: a circular emblem on the left and a red "BOOSTLY" logo on the right. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, capturing his movements from the chest up.
